what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a provider-registry channel item to a board item (board://item-c94cdfd3) as a board_items attachment, with an added timestamp.
observations: Target is a board item URI board://item-c94cdfd3
No body content beyond YAML frontmatter
standouts: Uses a board:// URI as the target reference
Attachment type board_items implies a board-item linkage
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, added fields
File naming uses attachment id att-1c384e0f.md
notes: A lightweight metadata stub linking a provider-registry channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or artifact is attached beyond the board item reference?
Is the target board item expected to exist in a board file?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches: it is a channel attachment record pointing to a board item.
intention_signals: To create a discoverable, timestamped association between a provider-registry channel entry and a board item.
contribution: Provides a machine-readable link between a channel attachment and a board item, supporting traceability from channel memory to board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file that links a provider-registry attachment to board item board://item-c94cdfd3 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record a board_items attachment associating a provider-registry channel artifact with a specific board item.
